ksa_text: Skill in applying analytical techniques to data, including performing exploratory and confirmatory analysis, creating analytics products, and developing transformation analytics that convert raw data into actionable findings.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of complex data structure capabilities and applications

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-003 (AB, Skill) maps to Quantitative Analyst scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.4168 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.417, onet=0.413, eu_ai_act=0.413. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4168 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AB-S-003 (AB, composite 0.4168) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 (Data Scientists), DCWF 411 (Data Analyst) and 421 profiles, DDAT Data Analyst role framework. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4168 with signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.417, onet=0.413, eu_ai_act=0.413 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4168, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
